title: Two busy roads to shut for water mains works
content:
Two busy roads in the north of the Isle of Man will remain closed for more than a week for water mains works.

Waterloo Road and Albert Road in Ramsey are both closed until 27 February to allow for trial hole excavations.

Manx Utilities said it would enable exploratory work to take place for water mains replacement.

A diversion, via Queen's Pier Road will be in place throughout the period.
